name: oracle-ai-data-platform-workbench-engineer-agent
description: Run the full Oracle AI Data Platform (AIDP) data-engineering surface from Codex in natural language - 37 skills: discover catalog, ask in English, AI-in-SQL, optimize/time-travel, pipelines, clusters, governance, agent flows, MLOps, migration. Self-contained (OCI CLI + api_key DEFAULT profile); the AIDP MCP is an optional accelerator.

interface.displayName: Oracle AI Data Platform - Engineer Agent
interface.shortDescription: Full AIDP data-engineering surface in natural language (37 skills).
interface.longDescription: Discover -> ask in plain English -> AI inside SQL -> optimize & time-travel -> govern & ship, all on a live AIDP lakehouse. MCP-optional: control-plane via the official aidp CLI / oci raw-request, interactive Spark SQL via a bundled helper. A SessionStart hook stages the helper to ~/.aidp on first run.
defaultPrompt: Set up and verify my AIDP connection.
Map my catalog - what data do I have?
What were my total net store sales, and how are sales spread across stores?
